codeReview.summary: Added devin agent config to src/agents.ts between deepagents and droid (alphabetical). Config follows the goose pattern exactly (non-universal + XDG): name 'devin', displayName 'Devin for Terminal', skillsDir '.devin/skills', globalSkillsDir join(configHome, 'devin/skills'), detectInstalled via existsSync(join(configHome, 'devin')). Satisfies all expected behaviors: correct field values, XDG detection, non-universal classification (skillsDir !== '.agents/skills'). Resolved the transient type error from devin-type. No issues.

summary: Correct agent config following the goose pattern. Fulfills VAL-REG-002 through VAL-REG-005. No issues.
